boundary: This report checks cloud artifacts and summarizes phase metrics. It does not authorize RTX speedup claims; claims require human/AI review of correctness, phase separation, hardware metadata, and comparison baselines.

rows.baseline_review_contract_claim_limit: experimental native road-hazard summary gate only; not default public app behavior or full GIS/routing speedup
rows.baseline_review_contract_scope: strict road-hazard native OptiX summary result on the same copies/output-mode semantics
rows.claim_scope: native OptiX segment/polygon traversal for compact road-hazard summaries
rows.cloud_contract_claim_scope: native OptiX segment/polygon hit-count traversal for compact road-hazard summaries
rows.cloud_contract_non_claim: not default road-hazard public speedup and not a full GIS routing or risk model claim
rows.non_claim: not default public road-hazard behavior and not a full GIS/routing speedup claim

rows.baseline_review_contract_claim_limit: experimental native hit-count gate only; not pair-row any-hit or road-hazard whole-app speedup
rows.baseline_review_contract_scope: strict segment/polygon hit-count result on the same dataset and output count semantics
rows.claim_scope: experimental native custom-AABB segment/polygon hit-count traversal
rows.cloud_contract_claim_scope: experimental native custom-AABB segment/polygon hit-count traversal gate
rows.cloud_contract_non_claim: not default public app behavior, not pair-row any-hit output, not road-hazard whole-app speedup, and not a public RTX speedup claim
rows.non_claim: not default public app behavior and not a row-returning any-hit claim

rows.baseline_review_contract_claim_limit: experimental native bounded pair-row gate only; not default public app behavior and not unbounded row-volume performance
rows.baseline_review_contract_scope: strict bounded segment/polygon pair-row result on the same dataset and output capacity
rows.claim_scope: experimental native bounded custom-AABB segment/polygon pair-row traversal
rows.cloud_contract_claim_scope: experimental native bounded custom-AABB segment/polygon pair-row traversal
rows.cloud_contract_non_claim: not default public app behavior and not an unbounded pair-row performance claim
rows.non_claim: not default public app behavior and not an unbounded pair-row performance claim
